  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: b1 on table (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: b2 on table (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: b3 on table (height 1)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: b4-b9 (height 6, b4 on bottom)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5: b10-b18 (height 9, b10 on bottom)
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm state
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 still on table (single block, no change needed)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 still on table (single block, no change needed)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 still on table (single block, no change needed)
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b3)

      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)

      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm empty at end

    )
  )
)
